HEAT Dice rolls to avoid ammo explosions and shutdown are han- dled bit differently for BattleMechs piloted by characters with Mw3 game statistics. Replace the target numbers the Heat   Scale with Computer Skill Check in the case of shutdown avoids with the following TN modifiers for  difficulty: Heat   Scale 14-17 (-41; Heat Scale 18-21 (-21; Heat  Scale 22-25 (+01; Heat Scale 29 (+21; at Heat Scale 30 shutdown unavoidable. Replace ammo explosion avoid rolls with EDG Checks with the following TN modifiers for difficulty: Heat Scale 19 (-1 Heat Scale 23-27 (-2); Heat Scale 28+ (+0).
